name: Chocolate Cherry Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Semi-sweet chocolate chips or white chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, water, and vanilla extract. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended.
3. Add eggs to the mixture and beat until incorporated.
4. Sift together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Mix into the creamed mixture at low speed just until combined.
5. Form rounded tablespoons (15 mL) of dough around each maraschino cherry, completely covering it. Place each cookie 2 inches (5 cm) apart on ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake one baking sheet at a time in oven for 7 to 9 minutes, or until cookies are set. Do not overbake. Cool cookies on baking sheet for 2 minutes before removing them to foil to cool completely.
7. For icing, place chocolate chips and shortening in a heavy resealable sandwich bag. Seal the bag. Microwave at 50% (MEDIUM) power. Knead the bag after 1 minute. Repeat until smooth or melt by placing the bag in a bowl of hot water. Cut a tiny tip off the corner of the bag and drizzle over cookies.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies
